posts.author: Renoria
content: This thread documents the current architecture of the forum system.
The current structure is based on boards, board-specific thread lists and dedicated thread data files.
Future evolution will likely move toward PHP, sessions and dynamic post creation.

posts.author: Renoria
content: Update: the board structure is now stable and rendering correctly.
Next step will be starting work on the forum backend, with the goal of making the system functional as soon as possible.
